strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems and real-time data processing (e.g., microservices at Dunnhumby, event-driven platforms like GISCollective)
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) frameworks at re:cinq, demonstrating alignment with agentic AI architecture
Strong engineering leadership in scaling teams and implementing disciplined development practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD at RIDE Capital, CI/CD setup at Altom Consulting)
concerns: Limited direct experience with fintech-specific systems (e.g., credit risk, payment flows, or embedded finance) as highlighted in the job description
No explicit mention of regulated or high-stakes commercial environments in fintech or comparable industries, which is a hard requirement

Lacks demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems in commercial contexts (resume focuses on web/mobile/embedded systems and AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq is recent and not fully detailed)
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical depth in distributed systems, real-time data processing, and recent involvement in AI-agent infrastructure, aligning with key architectural requirements. However, his resume lacks direct fintech domain experience, regulated environment exposure, and explicit production multi-agent AI system operation, which are critical for the CTO role in this fintech-scaleup context. His leadership in scaling teams and disciplined engineering practices is a notable strength.
